headline: Sieve Capital Issues Presentation Detailing Shareholders’ Opportunity to Improve the Board at Americold
summary: DALLAS, April 23, 2026--Sieve Capital LLC (collectively with its affiliates, "Sieve" or "we"), a shareholder of Americold Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: COLD) ("Americold" or the "Company"), today issued a detailed presentation explaining why shareholders should vote "AGAINST" the re-election of Mark Patterson and Andrew Power to the Company’s Board of Directors (the "Board") at Americold’s upcoming Annual Meeting of Shareholders (the "Annual Meeting").
